problem: A sequence starts with 5, 8, and each term is the sum of the previous two terms. What is the 5th term?
A car travels at 57 km/h for 2 hours. What is the total distance traveled?
In a group of 55 people, 23 like coffee and 31 like tea. If 7 people like both drinks, how many people like neither coffee nor tea?
A square has a perimeter of 56 meters. What is the length of one side?
A square has sides of length 10 cm. What is its area in square centimeters?
A rectangular field is 29 meters long and 9 meters wide. What is its area?
In a group of 31 people, 17 like coffee and 18 like tea. If 2 people like both drinks, how many people like neither coffee nor tea?
If 7 workers can complete a task in 12 days, how many days will it take 12 workers to complete the same task?
In a group of 41 people, 22 like coffee and 16 like tea. If 7 people like both drinks, how many people like neither coffee nor tea?
A shop sells items in packs of 12. If a customer orders 28 packs, how many items will they receive in total?
